final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign, designed for advertising purposes, in a 16:9 landscape format.

Style/medium: bold graphic design poster with layered typographic art, editorial commercial style reminiscent of high-impact retail advertising
Composition: 16:9 wide landscape layout, layered depth with foreground product(s) overlapping and partially obscuring background typographic elements, dynamic visual hierarchy
Subject: featured e-commerce products (e.g., electronics, fashion, or lifestyle goods) as hero objects placed in the foreground, physically blocking portions of the stacked lettering behind them
Scene/backdrop: rich, structured promotional background filled with stacked oversized decorative type and artistic lettering — complex but visually organized, not chaotic
Lighting/mood: vibrant and energetic commercial lighting, punchy contrast to make products and text pop simultaneously
Color palette: bold primary or complementary color scheme — warm accent colors (red, orange, or gold) against a deep or neutral base to signal sale/promotion
Materials/textures: glossy product surfaces, crisp vector-style typographic art mixed with dimensional letterforms
Text (verbatim): decorative artistic lettering and stacked font layers forming the backdrop — words such as "SALE", "NEW", "DEALS", "LIMITED" layered at varying scales and opacities; product objects overlap and cut across these letterforms
Constraints: typography must be stacked at multiple scales creating depth; at least one product or hero object must visibly occlude part of the lettering; overall composition must feel complex yet structured and legible — not cluttered
Avoid: empty or sparse layouts, single-layer flat text, uniform font sizes, fully legible unobstructed text blocks, generic stock-photo collage feel, random chaotic element placement
